# Osama Tahir — Web Developer & Digital Marketing Specialist, Dubai UAE

> Osama Tahir is a senior full-stack web developer, mobile app developer, and digital marketing specialist based in Dubai, UAE. He helps small businesses and startups across the UAE grow online through custom websites, mobile apps (Flutter & React Native), SEO, Google Ads, and performance marketing. 5+ years experience, 20+ production apps delivered, 500K+ app downloads.

## Services

- [Web Development Dubai](https://osama-me.digital/services/web-development-dubai): Custom website design and development for businesses in Dubai and the UAE. Starting from AED 5,000.
- [Mobile App Development Dubai](https://osama-me.digital/services/mobile-app-development-dubai): iOS and Android app development using Flutter & React Native for UAE businesses. Starting from AED 15,000.
- [SEO Services Dubai](https://osama-me.digital/services/seo-services-dubai): Local and technical SEO to rank on Google in Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and across the UAE. From AED 3,000/month.
- [Google Ads Management Dubai](https://osama-me.digital/services/google-ads-management-dubai): PPC campaign setup, management, and optimisation for UAE businesses. From AED 2,500/month.
- [Social Media Marketing UAE](https://osama-me.digital/services/social-media-marketing-uae): Social media strategy, content, and paid campaigns across platforms. From AED 2,000/month.
- [Shopify Development Dubai](https://osama-me.digital/services/shopify-development-dubai): Shopify store setup, customisation, and e-commerce solutions. Starting from AED 4,000.
- [WordPress Development Dubai](https://osama-me.digital/services/wordpress-development-dubai): WordPress website design, development, and maintenance. Starting from AED 3,500.
- [Landing Page Design UAE](https://osama-me.digital/services/landing-page-design-uae): High-converting landing pages for lead generation and paid traffic. Starting from AED 3,000.
- [Website Maintenance UAE](https://osama-me.digital/services/website-maintenance-uae): Monthly maintenance to keep your website fast, secure, and up to date. From AED 2,000/month.
- [AWS Management & Cloud Hosting UAE](https://osama-me.digital/services/aws-management-uae): AWS hosting, server management, and application maintenance. From AED 2,500/month.
